tasks.title: Confirm the build approach
tasks.expectedOutput: Implementation plan with boundaries, risks, tests, and handoff notes
tasks.resultSummary: Architecture response recorded. Canonical package and approved Blueprint now control implementation scope; any conflicting provider assumptions are superseded.

tasks.title: Implement the approved package
tasks.requiredInput: CANONICAL EXECUTION CONTRACT — Repository: Natural-Nation-MVP/natural-nation-mvp. Package NN-BUILD-001 objective: implement the Founder-approved Natural Nation Blueprint. Approved product: a mobile-first holistic wellness platform with a public brand website and Duey, a non-medical AI wellness mentor. Phase 1 requires onboarding, personalized blueprint, Day 1 dashboard, Daily Protocol Timeline, Wellness Score, Rejuvenation Score, progress tracking, Duey guidance, guest-first identity, and account upgrade without data loss. Billing is excluded from MVP. For this first implementation slice, create a testable member-facing static web foundation under app/frontend/ only: index.html, styles.css, app.js, README.md, and tests/validate-foundation.mjs. The page must present a responsive Day 1 dashboard preview with Duey identified as an AI wellness mentor, Wellness and Rejuvenation scores, a time-based protocol list, progress check-in controls, non-medical language, and mobile/tablet/desktop responsive behavior. The validation script must inspect the files and fail when the required experience elements are absent. Do not modify architecture decisions, secrets, Cloudflare configuration, GitHub workflows, or Founder OS. The provider response is constrained by the Gateway's repository_execution_plan JSON schema. Do not add markdown fences or narrative text outside that schema. Do not claim a pull request already exists; the protected repository adapter will create the real branch, commit, and pull request from the validated plan.
tasks.expectedOutput: A schema-valid repository execution plan that creates the five approved app/frontend files; the Gateway must convert it into a real GitHub pull request and record changed-file plus validation evidence

retryContext.reason: OpenAI could not execute because billing quota was unavailable, and Google rejected unsupported additionalProperties fields in the response schema.
retryContext.requiredCorrection: Use the Google-compatible response schema for fallback while preserving strict additionalProperties enforcement for OpenAI.

tasks.title: Review the experience
tasks.requiredInput: The real AI-TASK-002 pull request, changed files, validation script, and responsive Day 1 dashboard preview produced from the approved execution contract
tasks.expectedOutput: Concrete usability, mobile/tablet/desktop responsive, accessibility, and non-medical language findings with pass/fail evidence and cited file paths

retryContext.reason: The provider requested the preview and acceptance criteria instead of performing a review.

tasks.title: Prepare the Founder review
tasks.requiredInput: Verified implementation pull request evidence and populated Gemini design-review findings
tasks.expectedOutput: A completed plain-English summary of what changed, what passed, remaining risks, and the exact Founder decision required

retryContext.reason: The provider returned an unpopulated placeholder summary.

tasks.title: Approve or request changes
tasks.requiredInput: Verified build pull request, validation evidence, design findings, and Founder summary
